reasoning: Drake is consistently a Top 5 Spotify artist but has not taken the #1 global spot since 2018. Given the massive streaming leads these artists tend to build and Taylor Swift's sustained dominance, Drake's chances of reaching the absolute #1 spot in 2025 are very low.
